external_access_integrations.description: List of external access integrations attached to this function/procedure

secrets.description: Secrets to be used with this function/procedure for external access

target_path.description: Specifies where Snowflake should write the compiled code for inline procedures

runtime_version.description:
Specifies the Java JDK runtime version to use. 
                    The supported versions of Java are 11.x and 17.x (Preview support)
